name: govern
description: Governance planner (workflow plane): the Manage & Comply lane + QC/review. preregister freezes a comparison's spec before execution and registers it as a confirmatory obligation; obligations tracks/resolves the project's commitments; qc-review runs BIDS validation (via the bids doer) and a STAMPED self-assessment. Commitments live in the ledger obligations[] and are provenanced via the datalad doer.
